payload.answer: Sam left Goldman last month and joined Point72; he still listens to Bill Evans but lately more early Coltrane; they plan to catch up about AI infra and Sam wants Daniele to send the article.
citations: Sam - No, I left Goldman last month and joined Point72
Sam - Yes, but lately more early Coltrane
Daniele - We should catch up about AI infra
Sam - Definitely, send me that article
